---
title: "Teaching Assistant Experience"
sidebar: false
toc: false
css: ../css/teaching.css
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: teaching-assistant-listing
    contents: teaching-assistant.yml
    sort: [year desc]
    page-size: 10
    type: table
    categories: false
    template: teaching.ejs
---


<p>&nbsp;</p>

::: {#teaching-assistant-listing}
:::
